title: Local Dataset
description: Store and annotate images locally as an alternative to Frigate+.

empty.title: No images yet
empty.description: Save event snapshots or recording frames to the local dataset using the submit button on events or the video player.

deleteImage.title: Delete image
deleteImage.description: This will permanently remove the image and its annotations from the local dataset. This cannot be undone.

annotator.title: Annotate Image
annotator.instructions: Click and drag on the image to draw a bounding box. Click an existing box to select it.

toast.saveToDatasetFailed: Failed to save to local dataset: {{errorMessage}}
